login.biometric_not_detected: Biometrics not detected. We will try anyway.
login.biometric_failed: Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.
login.biometric_locked: Too many failed attempts. Please unlock your device and try again.
login.biometric_failed_use_password: Biometric authentication failed. Try your password instead.

create.title: Create Account
create.username_min_length: Username must be at least 3 characters long
create.biometric_not_supported: Biometric authentication is not supported on this device. Using password authentication instead.
create.password_security_info: Your account will be secured using a password. Make sure to choose a strong password.
create.biometric_security_info: Your account will be secured using biometric authentication (fingerprint, face ID, or Windows Hello).
create.biometric_prf_unsupported: This passkey provider is not compatible with secure biometric key derivation. Use your device passkey (Touch ID, Face ID, or Windows Hello) instead.
create.failed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
create.success_message: Your account has been created successfully.

import.title: Import with Mnemonic
import.description: Enter your 24-word mnemonic phrase to import your account. Make sure to enter the words in the correct order.
import.mnemonic_hint: Separate words with spaces. The phrase is case-insensitive.
import.mnemonic_invalid: Invalid mnemonic phrase. Please check your words and try again.
import.failed: Failed to import account. Please try again.
import.account_details_desc: Choose a username and security method for your imported account.

select.title: Select Account
select.failed: Failed to load accounts. Please try again.
select.no_accounts_desc: You don't have any accounts yet. Create a new account to get started.

secure_setup.title: Secure Storage Setup
secure_setup.info: You can create additional accounts for plausible deniability. Each account has its own password and data.
